# FDA Nutrition Label Generator

This is a simple web application for generating FDA-approved nutrition facts labels using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.

## Key Requirements:
- Keep the code simple and maintainable
- Use vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- Follow FDA nutrition label formatting guidelines
- Support ingredient-based nutrition calculation
- Provide export options (PNG, PDF, embed code)
- Use semantic HTML and accessible design patterns

## FDA Compliance Notes:
- Use proper rounding rules for nutrition values
- Display required nutrients in correct order
- Calculate daily values based on 2000-calorie diet
- Use correct font sizes and spacing as per FDA guidelines
